review_contract.sequence_rule: R14 is immutable REVISE history with its result digest and eight reviewed digests; the additionally authorized R15 is the only repair review, must bind the repaired three bytes, R14 result, and five predecessor digests, and must contain one final AGREE verdict; no R16 or alternate P02R3 plan-review round may exist
review_contract.budget_boundary: after the additionally authorized R15, two independently authorized review rounds remain reserved for result review and final-seal audit and cannot be consumed by further plan repair

binding_meanings.p01_predecessor: unchanged P01 stable decision and terminal receipt index copied only after reopening P02R2 entry

entry_bootstrap_profile.only_parameter: --agreeing-plan-review-ref followed by the exact R15 result ref; abbreviations, equal-sign form, repeats, positional values, missing or extra tokens are forbidden
entry_bootstrap_profile.failure_rule: require the P02R3 phase root absent before any write; pre-allocation failure writes nothing; after any mkdir or no-replace write, preserve partial state and forbid retry without human recovery

profile_patch.expected_base_value: current reconstruction drift, missing or mismatched invocation/raw evidence, source mutation, unclassified capability, limitation promoted or omitted, claimed field without independent provenance, valid independent contradiction, or unjustified selection is a phase veto; correctly classified specialist limitation alone blocks that specialist but does not refute exact current reconstruction
profile_patch.replacement: current reconstruction drift; source_mutated, invocation_mismatch, missing_artifact, or version_mismatch status; missing, duplicate, unreviewed, or mismatched invocation/raw evidence; unclassified capability; limitation omitted, mismatched, or promoted; claimed field without independent provenance; valid independent contradiction; frozen identity rewrite; or unjustified selection is a phase veto; a fully reconstructed timed_out, nonzero_exit, malformed_output, or valid_not_source_mappable record with exact source/invocation evidence, explicit matching limitations, empty promotion, and no contradiction blocks only that specialist

profile_patch.expected_base_value: current compact/materialized/source drift; missing, duplicate, unreviewed, or mismatched invocation/raw artifact; source mutation; unclassified capability; limitation omitted or promoted; claimed observation without independent provenance; valid specialist contradiction on an independently observed field; frozen identity rewrite; or unjustified specialist selection
profile_patch.replacement: current compact/materialized/source drift; source_mutated, invocation_mismatch, missing_artifact, or version_mismatch status; missing, duplicate, unreviewed, or mismatched invocation/raw artifact; unclassified capability; limitation omitted, mismatched, or promoted; claimed observation without independent provenance; valid specialist contradiction on an independently observed field; frozen identity rewrite; or unjustified specialist selection; correctly classified timed_out, nonzero_exit, malformed_output, and valid_not_source_mappable limitations alone are excluded

profile_patch.expected_base_value: correctly classified malformed or non-source-mappable specialist output is explanatory, blocks that specialist's promotion, and does not by itself veto an independently exact current reconstruction
profile_patch.replacement: a fully reconstructed timed_out, nonzero_exit, malformed_output, or valid_not_source_mappable specialist record with exact source/invocation evidence, a nonempty matching limitation registry, empty promotional fields, and no valid independent contradiction is explanatory, blocks that specialist, and does not by itself veto an independently exact current reconstruction; no invalid bytes supply observations or agreement

timeout_default_audit.failure_mode: runtime variance may still exceed 180 seconds or completed output may remain malformed/non-source-mappable
timeout_default_audit.early_diagnostic: one exact full disposable 2+26 profile with no retry and exact source pre/post digests
timeout_default_audit.registry_rule: replace the complete inherited executable registry exactly once; every executable has distinct positive integer version_timeout_seconds and source_timeout_seconds and no shared timeout_seconds key
timeout_default_audit.action_gate_rule: every version and source receipt must have timed_out false; any timed_out receipt makes parser_fidelity_tests nonzero and stops the success path even though a correctly classified source timeout alone does not set parser_veto
timeout_default_audit.promotion_status: target-specific reviewed hypothesis pending disposable execution
timeout_default_audit.non_claim: a completed specialist process is not source mapping, extraction correctness, parser promotion, or mathematical evidence

parser_veto_partition.contradiction_rule: any nonempty independently reconstructed contradictions list sets parser_veto regardless of otherwise valid capability status
parser_veto_partition.limitation_only_preconditions: exact invocation/source/version evidence, status precedence satisfied, matching nonempty limitation registry, empty promotional fields, ineligible for selection, no observations from invalid bytes, and empty contradictions
parser_veto_partition.validation_rule: parser_veto must equal the partition-and-contradiction reconstruction and cannot be accepted as an unchecked summary boolean

downstream_binding_contract.reviewed_plan_fields: bind the P02R3 recovery plan and digest
downstream_binding_contract.reviewed_compact_oracle_fields: bind the P02R3 compact overlay and digest; reopen P02R2 plan/oracle/entry, timeout blocker/adjudication, and diagnostics transitively
downstream_binding_contract.reviewed_materialized_oracle_fields: bind the unchanged materialized 17-obligation oracle and digest
downstream_binding_contract.schema_name_boundary: existing p02r2 structural schema-version literals remain unchanged because P02R3 changes policy values and namespace only; record revision fields and evidence refs identify P02R3
downstream_binding_contract.final_rule: candidate, final, review, audit, and stable reconstruction reopen the P02R3 entry and all transitive P02R2 bindings before accepting a pass

namespace_rule: all new entry, round, parser, guard, bundle, result, final, and stable artifacts use p02r3-20260712 or exact phase-02r3 document refs; P02R2 remains protected entry-only predecessor evidence
effective_profile_rule: strictly reconstruct the complete reviewed P02R2 effective profile, deep-copy it, require all eleven P02R3 patch expected_base_value values at exact JSON pointers, apply each replacement once, replace entry_snapshot_schema and entry_bootstrap_profile with this oracle values, and reject every other difference
unchanged_contract: all P02R2 effective values not listed in profile_patch or replaced wholesale by the P02R3 entry schemas remain exact and authoritative
